name: Wave Network
description: Premium SaaS-level Discord ticket system with ShardingManager, SLA tracking, auto-assignment, analytics, i18n, and rich staff tooling.

TOKEN.description: Your Discord bot token from the Discord Developer Portal.

CLIENT_ID.description: Your bot's application/client ID from the Discord Developer Portal.

PREFIX.description: Legacy command prefix (slash commands are primary).

OWNER_IDS.description: Comma-separated Discord user IDs of bot owners.

SUPPORT_URL.description: Discord invite link for your support server.

REPORT_CHANNEL_ID.description: Channel ID where user reports are posted.

STATUS_CHANNEL_ID.description: Channel ID for bot status updates.

ERROR_LOG_CHANNEL_ID.description: Channel ID where critical bot errors are posted.

VIP_ROLE_IDS.description: Comma-separated role IDs for VIP access.

WHITELIST_GUILD_IDS.description: Comma-separated guild IDs the bot is restricted to. Leave blank for all guilds.

SHARD_COUNT.description: Override the auto-detected shard count. Leave blank to let Discord decide.
